_comment: Portable deny-list snippet for the no-sudo-as-shortcut module. Paste these entries into the `permissions.deny` array of a host repo's .claude/settings.json. Covers sudo, su, chown, chmod 777, and the most common sudo-equivalent container/k8s escalations. If the project has a PERMISSIONS.md entry that genuinely requires one of these (e.g., a `deploy/install-*.sh` that must run with elevation), the human runs that command themselves outside the agent's tool surface — the deny list is intentional. Pairs with stay-in-project-tree's settings-snippet.json; they're the scope-of-action guardrail family. See the companion index.md for the prose rule.
